FFmpeg release: 8.1.2 "Hoare"
Release tag: n8.1.2
Release commit: 38b88335f99e76ed89ff3c93f877fdefce736c13
Deployment target: macOS 14.0
Architectures: arm64 and x86_64, built separately and merged with lipo
License target: LGPL 2.1-or-later

The two slices use the same component profile. ARCH, SDKROOT, compiler paths,
prefix, and -arch flags are supplied by Scripts/build-ffmpeg.sh.
External package discovery is disabled with the repository's fail-closed
Scripts/support/pkg-config-disabled shim.

--target-os=darwin
--enable-cross-compile
--cpu=generic
--disable-autodetect
--disable-everything
--disable-network
--disable-avdevice
--disable-ffplay
--disable-doc
--disable-debug
--disable-shared
--enable-static
--disable-x86asm
--disable-iconv
--disable-audiotoolbox
--enable-videotoolbox
--enable-ffmpeg
--enable-ffprobe
--enable-protocol=file
--enable-protocol=pipe
--enable-demuxer=mov
--enable-muxer=mp4
--enable-decoder=h264
--enable-decoder=aac
--enable-parser=h264
--enable-parser=aac
--enable-encoder=h264_videotoolbox
--enable-encoder=aac
--enable-filter=scale
--enable-filter=aresample
--fatal-warnings

Explicitly absent:

--enable-gpl
--enable-version3
--enable-nonfree
--enable-libx264
--enable-libx265

No external --enable-lib* option is used. Network support and all network
protocols are disabled. The only bundled command-line programs are ffmpeg and
ffprobe.
